tailor_gate.rationale: Tailored method is compatible, falsifiable, and no simpler route is evident; all open gaps are addressed by satisfied status.
Tailored method is compatible and falsifiable with a simpler primary baseline; only missing fulltext evidence for a foundational DR paper (gap-S2-fulltext).

final_review_gate.rationale: High-risk pressure points remain: lack of fundus-specific MAE adaptation (gap-S1-competing_baseline), unclear differentiation from WenLan (gap-S1-mechanism_module), and missing counter-evidence (gap-S1-counter_evidence). Fulltext of key DR paper (gap-S2-fulltext) is unresolved.

High-risk novelty gaps remain: prior art on MAE+Pyramid ViT for DR grading (gap_id: 2205.10063v1_14) and medical multi-modal models (gap_id: 2103.06561v6_11) must be contrasted with proposed contributions; falsifiability and differentiation claims require targeted evidence.
